Touches the UoA-sensitive topic of Variations and Extensions; exact alignment is not obvious from the clause text. Contract Manager should confirm against: Preferred: All variations negotiated and executed in writing prior to expiry of the current Agreement, in accordance with funder guidelines. | Acceptable: Extensions negotiated and executed in writing only if the current Agreement has itself expired. Extensions may cover changes beyond just an end date.
